faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Van Nest homes?
faqs.answer: Van Nest residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Pavement ants typically nest in cracks in foundations and sidewalks, while carpenter ants can damage wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species and apply the most effective treatment for complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in Van Nest?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Van Nest residents in most cases. Our team understands that ant infestations can escalate quickly, especially in multi-family buildings, so we prioritize rapid response to prevent the problem from spreading to neighboring units.

faqs.question: Is your ant control treatment safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We also provide clear instructions on any brief precautions needed during treatment, ensuring your Van Nest home remains safe throughout the process.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 ant control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive ant control service includes a thorough inspection of your Van Nest property, identification of ant species and nesting sites, targeted interior and exterior treatment, entry point sealing recommendations, and a follow-up visit if needed. The final price depends on your property size and infestation severity.
